arts.ttl: Hugo Ekitiké feels "better prepared" for next step than in the past
arts.sum: Eintracht Frankfurt forward Hugo Ekitiké says he feels "better prepared" for a move to a top club now than he did when he moved to Paris Saint-Germain at a young age.

Kenneth Taylor's extra time penalty last month was enough to send Ajax into the last-16 of the Europa League after a feisty second leg meeting with Union St.Gilloise. The 2-1 loss to the Belgian side ...

arts.ttl: Preview: Ajax vs. Eintracht Frankfurt - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Thursday's Europa League clash between Ajax and Eintracht Frankfurt, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
